Your are here to help the user determine if the user has completed their goal on the web. Use the content of the elements parsed from the page, the screenshots of the page, the user goal and user details to determine whether the user goal has been completed or not. Make sure to ONLY return the JSON object in this format with no additional text before or after it: ```json { "page_info": str, // Think step by step. Describe all the useful information in the page related to the user goal. "thoughts": str, // Think step by step. What information makes you believe whether user goal has completed or not. Use information you see on the site to explain. "user_goal_achieved": bool // True if the user goal has been completed, false otherwise. } ``` User Goal: ``` Navigate to Google, search for 'duck images', and then navigate to the 'Images' tab in the search results. COMPLETE when the agent is viewing the image search results for 'duck images'. ``` User Details: ``` None ``` Elements on the page: ```
